title: Viscord
description: Discord Integration mod for Multi Server setups and webhook message loop prevention.
body:
[![TheGameHosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f52f5662e9f96623527b26c684ff1f9d5eed33f8.jpeg)](https://thegamehosting.com/clientarea/aff.php?aff=154)

# 🤖 Viscord: The Ultimate Minecraft-Discord Bridge

Developed by Vonix-Network, **Viscord** creates a seamless, powerful, and real-time connection between your Minecraft server and your Discord community. Keep your players engaged and your staff connected, no matter where they are!

---

## 🚀 Key Features & Functionality

* **Two-Way Chat Sync:** Instantly syncs messages from your Minecraft server chat to a dedicated Discord channel, and relays Discord messages back into the game.
* **Customizable Events:** Personalize the messages displayed for player joins, leaves, and server status changes.
* **Full Command Integration:**
    * **In-Game Commands (e.g., `/discord`):** Used to get the discord link (more to come)
    * **Discord Slash Commands (e.g. `/list`):** List the players of one server
    * **Discord ! Commands (e.g. `!list`):** List the players in all servers in channel

---

## 🛠️ Command Reference

**Note:** Always check the official documentation or the `/viscord help` command for the most current and specific command usage and required permissions.

---

## 🔗 Get Started

Viscord is stable, actively maintained, and designed to foster a strong, unified community for your server.

**Download Viscord today and connect your worlds!**

## Dependencies

**_Kotlin for Forge is required for OkHttp for webhooks!_**
